title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Researchers at Cambridge are using AI tools including AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to identify how drug-resistant bacteria evade antibiotics. The approach compresses analysis timelines from years to minutes, accelerating discovery of countermeasures against antimicrobial resistance.
